title: index property with extra props and unions
description: Root `{a: string; b: number; [key: string]: string | number}` — declared `a`/`b` plus a `string | number` index signature. notes: The index signature admits every key, so strip and preserve decode identically — dynamic string-or-number keys are never dropped.
